justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the initial time preference but then offered to check for earlier times when the user had specified "after half past 5 in the evening."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed a close alternative when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and booked the appointment without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly finding and booking a suitable appointment.
